title: Ishkik caverns
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Ishkik caverns''' were a series of caves on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. They were made of stone similar to [[Granite/Legends|granite]] but weaker than it, which crumbled with time. It included both short and long passages, crisscrossing each other, with some of them eventually leading to remote mountains.<ref name="cg">''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

The Ishkik caverns were discovered when the efforts to construct one of the first [[Platform city|platform cities]] kept breaking through the surface to the caverns beneath. After three foiled attempts, the investors decided to construct their city somewhere else, and the caverns ended up being used by geologists and scouts in only cursory research.<ref name="cg" />

The caverns were used by three irstats of [[Tarasin]] during the [[Tarasin Revolt]] ([[161 BBY/Legends|161]]–[[154 BBY]]), where they hid their military cache. After the Revolt, the Tarasin left the caverns and took most of their supplies with them, but some caches remained hidden. The caverns stretched on for kilometers, and in addition to rumors of hidden riches, there were unconfirmed tales of strange [[kilassin]] and a hidden [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] race hidden in the depths of Cularin.<ref name="cg" />
